scripts.dev: concurrently --names web,convex "bun run --filter @botchestra/web dev" "bunx convex dev"
scripts.deploy:dev: [ -n "$VITE_CONVEX_URL" ] || (echo 'VITE_CONVEX_URL is not set' >&2 && exit 1) && bun run --filter @botchestra/web build && bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name botchestra-web-dev --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:prod: [ -n "$VITE_CONVEX_URL" ] || (echo 'VITE_CONVEX_URL is not set' >&2 && exit 1) && bunx convex deploy -y && bun run --filter @botchestra/web build && bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name botchestra-web --branch main --commit-dirty=true
